title: Nuclear magic numbers {2, 8, 20, 28, 50, 82, 126} from Dirac-D1 + fractional-1/2 promotion + physics ratio r in [1/3, 1/2)
_fixture_purpose: Verifies that QA axiom extension D1 (sigma in {1,2}), fractional-1/2 promotion rule conditioned on (sigma=2, b=e+1, l >= l*), and threshold l* = ceil(1/r) for r = alpha/hbar_omega in [1/3, 1/2) yield l* = 3 and reproduce all 7 experimental nuclear magic numbers by cumulative population through magic shell closures. Magic shells are HO N in {0, 1, 2} or half-integer N_eff (intruder-solo). Validator independently regenerates the full shell structure, applies the promotion, identifies magic closures, and checks the cumulative sequence equals {2, 8, 20, 28, 50, 82, 126}.
source_attribution: Will Dale + Claude 2026-04-13. Nuclear shell model: Mayer, M. G. (1950) Phys. Rev. 78, 16-21; Jensen, J. H. D. (1950) Phys. Rev. 78, 22; Bohr, A. and Mottelson, B. R. (1969) Nuclear Structure Vol. I. Spin-orbit magnitude ~20x atomic per standard nuclear physics references (Soton phys3002 lecture notes 05_shell.pdf). HO level spacing hbar_omega ~ 41 A^{-1/3} MeV (semi-empirical). Theory note: docs/theory/QA_NUCLEAR_MAGIC_SPIN_EXTENSION.md.

axiom_D1.name: Dirac fermion spin
axiom_D1.l_zero_restriction: for e=0 (l=0), only sigma=2 admissible (j = -1/2 unphysical)

physics_input_P1.physical_meaning: nuclear spin-orbit coupling strength / harmonic oscillator shell gap
physics_input_P1.why_atoms_need_no_extension: r_atomic < 1/100 gives l* > 50, never reached in aufbau; [220] works axiomatically

structural_rules.promotion_condition: sigma=2 AND b=e+1 AND l >= l*  (i.e. e >= 3 with l*=3)
structural_rules.magic_criterion: N_eff in {0, 1, 2} OR N_eff is half-integer

nonmagic_ho_residue_closures.note: rest of HO N=3 after 1f_{7/2} promoted out
rest of HO N=4 after 1g_{9/2} promoted out
rest of HO N=5 after 1h_{11/2} promoted out
rest of HO N=6 after 1i_{13/2} promoted out

witnesses.description: Cumulative populations through magic closures equal {2, 8, 20, 28, 50, 82, 126}, all 7 experimental magic numbers, zero misses.
witnesses.verification: validator regenerates all (b,e,sigma) up through N_eff = 11/2, applies promotion, sorts by N_eff, selects magic closures, accumulates populations.

witnesses.description: l* = ceil(1/r) = 3 for any r in [1/3, 1/2). Integer-valued threshold is forced by the window, not fitted.
witnesses.verification: at r = 1/3, 1/r = 3, ceil = 3; at r = 1/2, 1/r = 2, ceil = 2 (l* decreases to 2); narrow window for exactly l* = 3.

witnesses.description: Promotion amount 1/2 is the Dirac spin unit under axiom D1, not a free parameter. Spin-orbit energy shifts are proportional to (2sigma-3)/2 = +/- 1/2 in natural units.
witnesses.verification: substitute sigma=2 and sigma=1 into j = l + (2sigma-3)/2 to verify j = l+1/2 and j = l-1/2.

related_certs: [220] QA Madelung d-Ordering (atomic analogue, no spin extension needed)
[217] QA Fuller VE Diagonal Decomposition (different QA class)
[218] QA Haramein Scaling Diagonal (different QA class)
